description: Quality assertions for the golden run. citation_coverage = sources_cited / sources_collected. all_ids_valid means every src_NNN, fnd_NNN, and ins_NNN referenced anywhere exists in its parent registry. The 0.8 threshold matches requirements.md section 10.4. Citation coverage is enforced as a WARNING (not a failure) so that source-only runs can be compared structurally; --strict promotes warnings to non-zero exit.
